CreateAppBlbServerGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
CreateAppBlbServerGroup.name: Name of the server group for easy identification. Length 1~65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, -, /, . and _. Auto-generated if not specified.
CreateAppBlbServerGroup.desc: Description of the server group for additional details. Length 0~450 bytes, supports Chinese characters. Defaults to empty.
CreateAppBlbServerGroup.backendServerList: List of backend servers bound to the server group
CreateAppBlbServerGroup.backendServerList.weight: Weight of the backend server, value range 0-100
CreateAppBlbServerGroup.backendServerList.privateIp: Returned on query; the private IP address of the bound backend server
CreateAppBlbServerGroup.backendServerList.portList: Returned on query; list of ports exposed by the RS with corresponding policies configured
